problem_summary: Работающие сессии в bloger не присылают уведомления в Telegram-бот

steps.comment: Read CLAUDE.md, project structure, core watcher/all-mode principles, and required global references.
Checked service state, current project, bloger daily sessions, watcher logs, all-mode absence, unread TTL expiration, and silence mode state.
Traced delivery through Claude reader, session watcher, all-project monitor, pending delivery, and Telegram response delivery.
Identified root chain: silence mode suppresses non-final watcher messages; Claude external sessions are misclassified active because reader requires result event and ignores end_turn as terminal.
Created root-cause-report.md with evidence, root cause, recommendations, and workarounds.
